author: Kevin Kahl
releaseNotes:
This is a focused follow-up to the initial release, shaped by early community feedback.

- Configurable power and energy reporting: Disable reporting, report every change, or coalesce routine reports over a selected interval.
- Quieter logs: Unchanged attribute values are no longer repeated in informational logs.

For details, see https://github.com/kahlkevin/hubitat-casarita-inovelli_vtm31sn/blob/main/CHANGELOG.md
